candidate_summary: DOMBRA-CONSISTENCY-EVAL: paired single test prompt + canonical reference prompt; joint correctness + consistency-drift diagnostic; fixed-interval expected response distance; differs from variance-across-N-paraphrase brittleness benchmarks by SINGLE-PAIRED anchor comparison.

evaluations.title: Brittlebench Quantifying LLM Robustness via Prompt Sensitivity (2026/03)
evaluations.reason: Measures variance/sensitivity, not paired single-anchor + joint correctness+drift; no canonical-reference mechanism.

evaluations.title: PromptBench Microsoft Unified LLM Evaluation Framework
evaluations.reason: Multi-paraphrase adversarial/dynamic eval, not paired test+canonical-anchor with joint correctness+drift. Already declared differs-from.

evaluations.title: LLMs Surface-Form Brittleness Under Paraphrase Stress Tests (2025/10)
evaluations.reason: Stress tests over many paraphrases; no single paired anchor; no joint correctness+drift scoring.

evaluations.title: Systematic Consistency and Robustness Evaluation (NAACL 2025 Industry)
evaluations.reason: Broad consistency+robustness benchmark over multi-paraphrase sets; does not implement SINGLE paired test+canonical anchor with joint correctness+drift scoring.

evaluations.title: State of What Art Multi-Prompt LLM Evaluation (Mizrahi 2024)
evaluations.reason: Large-scale paraphrase collections, variance-based; not paired single-anchor consistency-drift + correctness joint diagnostic.

evaluations.title: PromptRobust Benchmark LLM Robustness
evaluations.reason: Computes consistency rate over ten semantically similar prompts (variance across N); not single paired test+canonical anchor with joint correctness+drift. Already declared differs-from.

evaluations.title: Beyond Magic Words Sharpness-Aware Prompt Evolving (2025/09)
evaluations.reason: Sharpness-aware prompt evolving for robust LLM, not paired test+canonical anchor with joint correctness+drift.

evaluations.title: Multi-Prompt LLM Evaluation State of What Art
evaluations.reason: Multi-prompt aggregation addressing single-prompt brittleness; not paired single test+canonical anchor with joint correctness+drift.

verdict_sentence: PASS: no source in 06_search_raw.json meets the hit thresholds (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7) against DOMBRA-CONSISTENCY-EVAL's distinguishing single paired-anchor + joint correctness+drift mechanism, with all hits being generic-overlap variance/robustness benchmarks rather than single-paired canonical-reference diagnostics.
